creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fails to build as distinfo file does not have the checksums for the maildir patch ?

===>   alpine-2.21 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> alpine-2.21/maildir.patch.gz is not in /usr/ports/mail/alpine/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/mail/alpine/distinfo is out of date, or
=> alpine-2.21/maildir.patch.gz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1
